title: query fleet governance
manager: `query` — ask one behavioral question across every machine in an org, with every hit shipping its witness tape. This is fleet governance: "which of our machines can reach a state that charges a customer without a confirmation step" answered across the whole fleet at once, each answer carrying its proof. It is the audit tool for an organization running hundreds of verified machines that no human could review one at a time.
cs: `query` predicates (reachable/flow/through/population/edition) over the checker machinery fleet-wide; witness tape per hit; the org-wide governance verb.
